_comment: octos gateway/serve UserProfile for driving the feetech omni-car from Matrix/robrix. Copy to <data-dir>/profiles/feetech.json and fill in the placeholders. This is the kind of profile serve/gateway load (NOT the chat --profile coding/swarm runtime profile). Verified working on macOS 2026-06-23 (robrix -> octos -> real car).
name: Feetech Omni Car

env_vars._comment: Serial device for the car's USB-TTL. Linux: /dev/ttyACM0. macOS: /dev/cu.usbmodem<XXXX> (run `ls /dev/cu.usbmodem*`). The plugin process inherits this.

channels._comment_homeserver: palpo CS-API reachable FROM the host running octos. With palpo in Docker and octos on the host, use the host port mapping (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:8128) — NOT the docker-internal name http://palpo:8008.
channels._comment_tokens: as_token/hs_token MUST match the appservice registration palpo loads (e.g. appservices/octos-registration.yaml). Regenerate for production: openssl rand -hex 32.
channels._comment_port: octos listens here for appservice pushes from palpo. palpo's registration `url` must reach it (e.g. http://host.docker.internal:8009 when palpo is dockerized and octos on host).
